title: Sidi Kerir Demand Impact Muted Crude Tanker Mileage Decline Driven By Vlccs
section_path: Sidi Kerir Demand Impact Muted Crude Tanker Mileage Decline Driven By Vlccs
section_path_text: Sidi Kerir Demand Impact Muted Crude Tanker Mileage Decline Driven By Vlccs
summary:
Main
This week, in the East, we discuss the implications for Aframaxes and Suezmaxes of high crude exports from Sidi Kerir and the fundamentals supporting Pacific MR earnings. In the West, crude tanker mileage declined due to fewer VLCC voyages from the Americas to Asia, and Cross-Med TC6 rates are supported. By Mary Melton
Crude exports from Egypt's Sidi Kerir remain high so far in March, following on from a multi-year high in February.
